title: pelargonium × kewense
intro: Pelargonium × kewense, a hybrid species of the pelargonium family, is a unique and versatile plant also known as the 'Herbert's Variety' or 'Kew Scarlet'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × kewense include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, soothe cold and flu symptoms, and even help manage stress and anxiety. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
